economic_notes: Fox Lake Cree Nation holds a 5% interest in Keeyask Hydro Power Limited Partnership through FLCN Keeyask Investment Inc. Fox and York Keeyask Joint Venture provides employment retention and support services. Multiple business entities including construction, rentals, hospitality, gaming, smoke shop, and insurance agency operations on reserve.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 statements were not audited until November 1, 2023 — a significant delay of approximately 19 months. The dominant long-term debt item is a Manitoba Hydro loan of $73.4M related to the Keeyask Hydro Power Limited Partnership investment, which includes $11.9M in accrued deferred interest charges. The nation holds a 5% interest in Keeyask Hydro Power LP valued at cost of $61.9M. Two joint ventures accounted for under modified equity method (FYKJV and AKKMJV). isc_funding uses 'Indigenous and Northern Affairs Canada' label as stated in statements. total_government_transfers includes INAC $3,489,716 + Health Canada $2,610,446 + CMHC $259,276 + Province of Manitoba $295,457 = $6,654,895. expenses_housing combines Band Housing $1,492,616 and CMHC Housing $279,420. Non-financial covenant breach noted on Fox Lake Ventures LP mortgage.
